description: Companion to custodian_guard_dupe_labels: the AI thinking log must identify WHICH duplicate squad it is reasoning about. Player 1 owns three squads whose display_names are 'Custodian Guard Alpha/Beta/Gamma' (all sharing meta.name 'Custodian Guard'). P1 plays its Command+Movement phases as AI; assert at least one AI thinking entry names a squad WITH its Greek suffix — the old AIDecisionMaker used bare meta.name, so every log line said just 'Custodian Guard' and the player couldn't tell which squad the AI meant.

steps.script: GameEventLog.has_ai_entry_containing_any(["Custodian Guard Alpha", "Custodian Guard Beta", "Custodian Guard Gamma"])
